{ "name": "psr/container", "type": "library", "description": "Common Container Interface (PHP FIG PSR-11)", "keywords": ["psr", "psr-11", "container", "container-interop", "container-interface"], "homepage": "https://github.com/php-fig/container", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "PHP-FIG", "homepage": "https://www.php-fig.org/" } ], "require": { "php": ">=7.4.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Psr\\Container\\": "src/" } }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "2.0.x-dev" } } }
